picks.quote: Allen swept rounds two through four on all three scorecards... Allen himself, he said before the fight that RDR ain't that guy... Turned out in this case, he was right.
Rounds one and three are close... round three, I think, is clear for Zahabi in my opinion.
That's probably what happens [Tom walking over him], but there's still enough unknown about Aspenol that you should be very careful about just declaring this is the next step in his journey.
